text: Practice makes progress, not perfect.
The expert in anything was once a beginner.
author: Helen Hayes

text: Don't be afraid to make mistakes — that's how you learn.
Small steps every day add up to big changes.
A different language is a different vision of life.
author: Federico Fellini

text: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
author: Wittgenstein

text: Today's effort is tomorrow's fluency.
Speak it out loud. Even if it's wrong.
If you can dream it, you can say it.
Repetition is the mother of skill.
author: Tony Robbins

text: Confidence comes from doing the thing you're scared of.
Learning a new language is becoming a new person.
Every native speaker was once a learner.
Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: Progress, not perfection.
Show up. That's already 80%.
Fluency is built one awkward sentence at a time.
Trust the process. Show up daily.
Five sentences today, a story tomorrow.
Comfort zone is where dreams go to die.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
author: Nelson Mandela

text: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
author: Aristotle

text: Speak even if your voice shakes.
You miss 100% of the words you don't try.
One day or day one. You decide.
Mistakes are proof that you are trying.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
author: Abraham Lincoln

text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
author: Sean Patrick Flanery

text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier

text: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Japanese Proverb

text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: Lao Tzu

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: Energy and persistence conquer all things.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Whether you think you can or think you can't, you're right.
author: Henry Ford

text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
author: Tim Notke

text: Imperfect action beats perfect inaction.
author: Harry S. Truman

text: Your only competition is who you were yesterday.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Don't count the days. Make the days count.
author: Muhammad Ali

text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Dream big. Start small. Act now.
author: Robin Sharma

text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
author: Buddha

text: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
author: Aristotle

text: Comparison is the thief of joy.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Slow progress is still progress.
One conversation at a time. One sentence at a time.
